title: Overflow referral to sibling GP practice
content:
## When to use overflow

Only for **urgent** cases after swap protocol is exhausted.

## Steps
1. Read practice directory; pick up to 2 sibling practices by postcode distance.
2. Discover each sibling's front desk agent card (never hardcode URLs).
3. Send standard booking request with optional `referral` extension (origin practice, priority assessment).
4. Sibling may re-score or trust same-directory peer assessment.
5. Relay offer back to patient through **origin** practice — patient keeps one point of contact.
6. Sequential attempts, 30s timeout each; skip downed siblings.

Foreign agents that ignore structured data still see a valid plain-text booking request.
